/usr/bin/c++  -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -rdynamic CMakeFiles/contact_stiffness_test.dir/src/contact_stiffness_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/contact_stiffness_test.dir/src/Visualiser/Visualiser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/contact_stiffness_test.dir/src/Optimiser/Optimiser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/contact_stiffness_test.dir/src/Optimiser/iLQR.cpp.o CMakeFiles/contact_stiffness_test.dir/src/ModelTranslator/BoxSweep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/contact_stiffness_test.dir/src/ModelTranslator/TwoDPushing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/contact_stiffness_test.dir/src/ModelTranslator/PushBaseClass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/contact_stiffness_test.dir/src/ModelTranslator/ImpactLargeBox.cpp.o -o contact_stiffness_test  -Wl,-rpath,/home/davidrussell/mujoco/lib libcore_lib.a /home/davidrussell/mujoco/lib/libmujoco.so.3.2.6 -lglfw -lGL -lGL /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libPNGwriter.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpng.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so -lm
